channel.title: Graphs on Moe's VR blog
channel.description: Recent content in Graphs on Moe's VR blog

item.title: Unix GC Remastered
item.description: Introduction The AF_UNIX garbage collector is an interesting piece of the kernel. It exists because sockets can be sent with SCM_RIGHTS but they can become unreachable from user-space while still being kept alive by the kernel, which is not memory efficient; in this situation, the garbage collector intervenes to free them.
